description: Test deck for agenda icon and bullet fixes

slides.title: Before and After DALP
slides.col1:
* Manual reconciliation processes
* Fragmented custody solutions
* Paper-based compliance
* 15-30 day settlement cycles
* Multiple intermediary layers
slides.col2:
* Automated on-chain reconciliation
* Unified digital custody
* Programmable compliance rules
* Near-instant atomic settlement
* Direct peer-to-peer transfers
